description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-shell suitcase with a matte black exterior and reinforced metallic corner protectors. The front features a prominent silver latch lock mechanism and a sturdy, curved brown handle, likely made of leather or faux leather, attached with metallic fixtures. The suitcase's edges are accentuated with a thin, tan trim, adding a subtle contrast to the dominant black color. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a synthetic or coated material, possibly leather or vinyl. No wheels, external pockets, or visible brand logos are present on any side. The overall design is classic and utilitarian, suitable for travel or storage in urban environments.
description: A rectangular, hard-shell black suitcase with metallic corners, a brown handle, and a silver latch lock. The design is classic and functional, with no wheels or external pockets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brown handle, silver latch lock, and reinforced metallic corners.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain black surface and metallic corner protectors, with no handle or lock visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the uninterrupted black surface and metallic corners, with no handle or lock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing a plain black surface and metallic corners.
